{{Quote|You going to watch a fight or participate in one|Mandalorian sergeant|<ref name="Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords">''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]''</ref>}}
This [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] '''sergeant''' was a member of the [[Mandalorians (Clan Ordo)|Mandalorians]] [[Clan Ordo]] under [[Canderous Ordo|Mandalore the Preserver]], the current [[Mandalore (title)/Legends|Mandalore]]. [[Gender/Legends|He]] watched and commanded the [[Battle Circle]], an area where Mandalorians would pit against each other for practice and competition. When [[Meetra Surik]] came to [[Dxun/Legends|Dxun]], she defeated every Battle Circle opponent in the [[Mandalorian Outpost (Dxun)|camp]].

==Behind the scenes==
If Surik broke a rule of the circle, the [[Sergeant/Legends|Sergeant]] would give her a warning. If she violated the rules a second time, she was forbidden to fight in the Battle Circle. The Sergeant would ridicule her, and the rest of the camp saw her as ignorant of Mandalorian culture.

The Mandalorian sergeant wore the [[Color/Legends|red]] [[Neo-Crusader armor]] of a [[Rally Master]]. This may be because of his rank as a [[Non-commissioned officer/Legends|non-commissioned officer]], or testament to his history in battle.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]'' {{1st}}
